# ClaimZen

> Evidence-backed denial recovery for dental practices and revenue-cycle teams.
> ClaimZen reads every payer denial, checks it against the practice's own records,
> and — when the payer is wrong — drafts the appeal with signed, verifiable proof.

## What it does
- Reads every payer denial (email, EOB, and PDF), correlates it to the claim.
- Runs eight verification checks against the provider's own records and the
  clearinghouse: prior authorization, timely filing, exact duplicates,
  underpayments, patient-responsibility errors, and invalid CARC codes.
- When a denial contradicts the records, drafts an evidence-backed appeal that
  waits for one-click human approval. Nothing is sent without sign-off.
- Every case produces a signed, tamper-evident evidence record that verifies
  offline — receipts, not claims.

## Who it's for
Independent and group dental practices, DSOs, and RCM / billing teams.

## Why it matters
The average dental practice loses $50,000-$120,000 a year to denied claims, and
67% of denials are never resubmitted. ClaimZen recovers that revenue.

## Contact
Early access: https://claimzen.ai/#contact  ·  email: dj@codetestcode.io
